summary: DRHP Word Document Direct Upload Feature - All tests passed. New 'Upload DOCX' button in header triggers direct file upload. Submit for Review button moved to bottom of page. Backend API correctly validates file types (only .docx), enforces 50MB limit, and preserves formatting.
passed_tests: 1. Backend: Authentication required for import - PASS
2. Backend: Valid auth token accepted - PASS
9. Backend: Tables preserved with drhp-table class - PASS
10. Backend: Import to SME board - PASS
14. Frontend: Upload DOCX button visible (data-testid='upload-docx-btn') - PASS
15. Frontend: Button triggers file input directly - PASS
16. Frontend: File input accepts only .docx - PASS
17. Frontend: Submit for Review button at bottom (data-testid='submit-for-review-btn') - PASS
18. Frontend: Success toast displayed after upload - PASS
19. Frontend: Upload progress toast shown during import - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: TipTap editor shows duplicate extension warning for 'link' and 'underline' - minor console warning, not affecting functionality
test_credentials: Test user, session, and project created via mongosh - cleaned up after testing
seed_data_creation: Test .docx files created programmatically using python-docx for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Direct DOCX upload feature fully functional. New test IDs: upload-docx-btn (direct upload button in header), submit-for-review-btn (at bottom of page). API endpoint: POST /api/projects/{project_id}/drhp-output/import?board_type=sme|mainboard. Uses mammoth library for .docx to HTML conversion. Supports files up to 50MB. Frontend validates file type and size before upload.

direct_upload_button.description: Upload DOCX button in header triggers file input directly

file_size_limit.description: 50MB file size limit enforced on frontend

submit_for_review_button.description: Submit for Review button at bottom of page

upload_progress.description: Upload progress toast shown during import

success_toast.description: Success toast displayed after successful import

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/projects/{project_id}/drhp-out: Imports .docx file, converts to HTML using mammoth, saves to database
